# Forevermore Farm

> A regenerative farm in Lyles, Tennessee — 45 minutes from Nashville.

Forevermore Farm is a working farm in Lyles, TN (37098) tended by Olin and Concetta West. The farm raises heritage Berkshire and Gloucestershire Old Spot pigs free-range with no pharmaceutical vaccines, Nigerian Dwarf goats, sheep, and chickens. Concetta is a certified Straw Bale Gardening instructor trained under Joel Karsten. The farm hosts seasonal workshops, farm days, and community events. Farm stays are coming soon. The farm is connected to The LOCAL Place (thelocalplacetn.com) in Centerville, TN.

- [Events & Workshops](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/events)
- [Gallery](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/gallery)
- [Stay at the Farm](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/stay)
- [Contact](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/contact)

## Key Facts

- [Location](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/contact): Lyles, TN 37098, Hickman County
- [Our Farm](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/our-farm): ~45 minutes southwest of Nashville
- [Animals](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/our-farm): Heritage Berkshire pigs, Gloucestershire Old Spot pigs, Nigerian Dwarf goats, sheep, chickens
- [Straw Bale Gardening](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/straw-bale-garden): Certified instructor trained under Joel Karsten
- [Events and Workshops](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/events): Seasonal workshops and farm days
- [Stay at the Farm](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/stay): Farm stays coming soon
- [Contact](https://forevermorefarmtn.com/contact): Join the email list for first announcements
